description: CompositionPurple printed kurta made of 100% cotton, with a boat neck, V-shaped printed bib on the front, short sleeves and has a curved hem FittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separately Do not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang in the form of this printed kurta from w! Look ethnically hip in this colourful print, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose white or purple kameez and chunky accessories for a chic look. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
